Class NbJava

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.ToolContext
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.AnahataToolkit
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.java.Java
uno.anahata.asi.swing.toolkit.SwingJava
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.NbJava
All Implemented Interfaces:
ContextProvider, PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class NbJava extends SwingJava
A NetBeans-aware extension of the core Java toolkit. It adds the ability to execute code within the context of a specific project, enabling a powerful "hot-reload" workflow by prioritizing the project's compiled output.
Author:
anahata

  • Field Details

    • mrJarRegistry

      private transient List<File> mrJarRegistry
      A transient registry of JAR files that support Multi-Release versions. Used to bridge classes from META-INF/versions into the dynamic loader.

  • Constructor Details

    • NbJava

      public NbJava()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Performs initial setup for a newly created toolkit instance.

      This method is called exactly once by the ToolManager after the toolkit has been instantiated and registered. It provides a clean hook for toolkits to perform one-time initialization logic that requires the tool environment to be fully configured, such as scanning for project instructions or registering default resources.

      Empty implementation as per architectural refinement. Initialization logic is moved to Java.postActivate() and Java.setDefaultClasspath(String).

      Sets the default classpath to include the NetBeans modules environment.

      Overrides:
      initialize in class Java

    • postActivate

      public void postActivate()
      Callback method triggered by the Asi Container once the Agi session has been fully deserialized and associated to the ASI container.

      Synchronizes the classpath printer with the current default classpath after the toolkit has been activated or deserialized.

      Re-establishes the default classpath after deserialization, ensuring connectivity to the NetBeans module system is maintained.

      Overrides:
      postActivate in class Java

    • createClassPathPrinter

      protected VeryPrettyClassPathPrinter createClassPathPrinter()
      Factory method to create the specialized classpath printer.

      Overrides the factory to inject the specialized NetBeansJarHandler.

      Overrides:
      createClassPathPrinter in class Java
      Returns:
      A new VeryPrettyClassPathPrinter instance.

    • setDefaultClasspath

      public void setDefaultClasspath(String defaultCompilerClasspath)
      Sets the default classpath for the compiler and classloader.

      Invalidates the MR-JAR registry when the classpath changes to ensure environmental consistency.

      Overrides:
      setDefaultClasspath in class Java
      Parameters:
      defaultCompilerClasspath - The new default classpath string.

    • findClassFallbackBytes

      protected byte[] findClassFallbackBytes(String name)
      A hook for subclasses to provide class bytes if the standard loading flow fails.

      This is used by the NetBeans implementation (NbJava) to bridge Multi-Release JAR classes into the memory-based loader.

      Implements the surgical fallback by searching for missing classes within the registered Multi-Release JARs using the current JVM version. Restricted to "org.lwjgl." as it is just to workaround a netbeans bug in JarClassLoader.

      Overrides:
      findClassFallbackBytes in class Java
      Parameters:
      name - The FQN of the class.
      Returns:
      The class bytes, or null if not found.

    • ensureMrJarRegistry

      private void ensureMrJarRegistry()
      Lazily populates the Multi-Release JAR registry by scanning the current default classpath.

    • buildProjectClasspathString

      public String buildProjectClasspathString(String projectPath, boolean includeProjectDependencies, boolean includeTestContext) throws Exception
      Builds the comprehensive execution classpath for a project.
      Parameters:
      projectPath - The absolute path of the NetBeans project.
      includeProjectDependencies - Whether to include the project's dependencies.
      includeTestContext - Whether to include test dependencies.
      Returns:
      The classpath string.
      Throws:
      Exception - if project resolution fails.

    • compileAndExecuteInProject

      public Object compileAndExecuteInProject(String sourceCode, String projectPath, boolean includeProjectDependencies, boolean includeTestContext, String[] compilerOptions) throws Exception
      Compiles and executes Java source code within the context of a specific NetBeans project. This tool enables a powerful 'hot-reload' workflow by creating a dynamic classpath that prioritizes the project's own build directories (e.g., 'target/classes') over the application's default classpath.
      Parameters:
      sourceCode - Source code of a public class named **Anahata** that has **no package declaration** and **extends AnahataTool**.
      projectPath - The absolute path of the NetBeans project to run in.
      includeProjectDependencies - Whether to include the project's COMPILE and EXECUTE dependencies.
      includeTestContext - Whether to include the project's test source folders and test dependencies.
      compilerOptions - Optional additional compiler options.
      Returns:
      The result of the execution.
      Throws:
      Exception - on error.

    • waitForIde

      private void waitForIde(org.netbeans.api.project.Project project, String cosStatus) throws InterruptedException
      Pauses execution until the IDE's background indexer has finished and allows 'Compile on Save' events to settle. This prevents race conditions when trying to execute recently modified code.
      Parameters:
      project - The project being executed.
      cosStatus - The current Compile on Save status of the project.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the wait is interrupted.

    • getJarBaseName

      private static String getJarBaseName(String filename)
      Extracts the base name of a JAR file by removing the extension and version-specific suffixes. Used for deduplicating classpath entries.
      Parameters:
      filename - The full filename of the JAR.
      Returns:
      The normalized base name.
